title: Not equal evaluation does not work
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t3 (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR(10), status BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO t3 (value, status) VALUES ('active', TRUE), ('inactive', FALSE), ('active', TRUE);
CREATE TABLE t4 (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, score FLOAT, description TEXT);
SELECT t3.id, t3.value, t4.score FROM t3 JOIN t4 ON t3.value <> t4.score WHERE t3.id > 1;
key_bug_features: Not equal evaluation in SQL query fails
